channel.title: Range-Bound on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Range-Bound on Archive 03

item.title: Bitcoin in the $70k Range: Who Is Buying?
item.description: Bitcoin ($BTC) is stuck in a $70,000 range. After a failed attempt to break $80,000, the market is moving sideways. While April saw $2.4 billion in ETF net inflows, long-term holder behavior remains mixed. We analyze whether this is an accumulation or a distribution phase.
